must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential Term Sheet — Proposed SAR 85,000,000 strategic investment by Red Dune Logistics Co. into Najm Tech Holdings JSC (Kingdom of Saudi Arabia).
Parties: Investor — Red Dune Logistics Co. (C R 7018 899901, VAT 312345678901234, HQ: Building 12, Al‑Nahdah Dist., Riyadh 1 3 2 4 4); Issuer — Najm Tech Holdings JSC (C R 7031 122009).
Signatory (Investor): Mr. Sami Al‑Qassim (Chief Executive Officer), National ID/Iqa ma 10 1234 5678 (invalid checksum), Passport No. P‑KSA9901234; contact y.alqassim@reddune.example.sa, +966 54 000 9123.
Issuer contact: Dr. Latifa Al‑Harbi (Chair), email: chair@najmtech.example.sa; deal room: https://secure.example.sa/nda?cr=7018899901&nid=10%201234%205678.
Subscription account (fictional): IBAN SA45 8000 1234 5678 9012 3456 at Al‑Rimal Bank; secondary wire support +966‑11‑555‑7788.
Indicative terms (non‑public): private placement of 3,000,000 shares at SAR 28.50 per share; CMA pre‑filing (non‑public) target 2026‑07‑15; Tadawul Growth admission contemplated post‑closing.
Conditions precedent: CMA approval, issuer board resolution (1448‑10‑12H), completion of KYC/AML on Investor; cross‑border personal data transfer to be logged via SDAIA DTA with permit ID X‑SDAIA/REQ/023‑77‑ALPHA.
PDPL notice: personal data (as defined under KSA PDPL) including names, Iqama, phone, and email will be processed for deal execution; any transfer outside KSA requires SDAIA permit and SCC‑equivalent safeguards.
Covenants: Investor lock‑up 180 days post‑admission; use of proceeds to fund “NajmTech Edge” product expansion; no dividend until FY+1 unless CMA conditions permit.
Negative/benign: This draft omits any MAC wording; no material adverse change clause is agreed at this stage, and the generic policy text below is not operative.
Generic placeholders: Name: __________ ; Role: Finance Manager ; Address: __________________ ; Public Helpline: 800‑000‑0000 (public).
Administrative contacts (role‑only): legal@issuer.example.sa; helpdesk@reddune.example.sa; main line +966 9200 00000 (call center).
Data handling: Do not email passport images; upload to https://vault.example.sa/upload?token=RDL‑A1B2C3&iq=2 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8; retention limited to closing + 7 years.
Issuer workflow: board pack circulation by 2026‑06‑25; cma_followup=false until draft PR cleared; press references to growth plans are public‑source and non‑binding.
Reps & warranties: Issuer affirms no undisclosed liabilities above SAR 2,000,000; Investor warrants funding capacity evidenced by bank letter (not attached here).
